creator: will@physics.purdue.edu
text:
On Tue, Dec 12, 2000 at 10:20:04PM +0100, marc.vanwoerkom@science-factory.com wrote:
> 	Note: There was a bad value `update' for the field `>Class:'.
> 	It was set to the default value of `sw-bug'.

As a side note, I'm betting this is a problem with GNATS server itself
and Steve Price should be spanked.  ;-)

> >Synopsis:       new port: linux-q3ademo

Excellent.

> X# New ports collection makefile for:   linux-q3ademo
> X# Date created:        11 December 2000
> X# Whom:                Marc van Woerkom <3d@freebsd.org>
> X#
> X# - inspired by linux realplayer 7 port
> X# - special thanks to the Emacs key board macro

This should not be included in the port.. perhaps mentioned in the
commit log.

> X# $FreeBSD:$

$FreeBSD$ not $FreeBSD:$ (and yes it does matter).

> XPORTREVISION=   1
> XCATEGORIES=	games graphics linux

I'm assuming these are also leftovers from linux-realplayer, since
q3ademo is most certainly not a graphics port, and PORTREVISION is
illegal for a port's first version.

> X.if !exists(${DISTDIR}/${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX})
> XIGNORE=		may not be automatically fetched due to licensing\
> X		restrictions.  You MUST manually fetch the Linux version from:\
> X		http://quake3.lokigames.com \
> X		- once ${DISTFILES} has been downloaded, move it to\
> X		${DISTDIR} and then restart this build.
> X.endif

Please don't use "IGNORE" directly.

> XTested with:
> Xo FreeBSD5.0-CURRENT, AMD K7-700, GeForce DDR, XFree86 3.3.6, 
> X  Mesa 3.2.1, Utah glx 0.9 (the rather slow hw acc driver)
> X  results in 21.5 fps (640x480x16) for time demo 'demo001'.
> X  Sound worked fine (SB Live).

Oooh.. GeForce works?  I'm gonna have to buy one.  :-)

> Xshare/q3ademo/Help/Manual/htmlpages/arenae.html
[...]

These should be wrapped with %%PORTDOCS%% PLIST_SUB.. in fact that should
have gone into bsd.port.mk by default a long time ago.  Many other ports
already include something like this.

Thanks for your port, I really appreciate it.  I'm gonna have to give it
a try myself, but I doubt it'll work with my outdated graphics card.  I
think I might end up just not playing Q3A.. RT2 and others suffice.  :-)

-- 
wca
